title: Codex loses context after a few turns
body: After about 10 messages the assistant gives generic advice unrelated to my codebase.

title: Claude ignores system prompt instructions
body: Despite repeating the formatting rules in the system prompt, the model keeps producing output in a different format on every turn.

title: Codex hallucinates imports that don't exist
body: It confidently writes `from utilz import process_x` but utilz is not a real package and was never installed in the environment.

title: [BUG] Codex loses task intent mid-session
body: After about 10 messages the assistant gives generic advice unrelated to my codebase.

title: Make gpt-5.5 not get distracted by excessive frontend guidance in system prompt
body: The model is constantly distracted by frontend guidance even when the task is purely backend python.

title: Cursor keeps looping on same message
body: It says the same thing again and again and again, never actually completing the task.

title: Codex enters an infinite reasoning loop
body: The thinking trace just keeps repeating the same step multiple times and never produces output.

title: Tool call returns wrong JSON schema
body: The mcp tool invocation returns a payload that does not conform to the declared schema; downstream parsing fails immediately.

title: replace_in_file says code was modified but no file changes
body: The agent claims the diff was applied successfully but on disk nothing changed; subsequent steps fail because the supposed edit is missing.

title: Unable to connect GitHub Auth to OpenAI Codex
body: OAuth callback fails with a generic error and the configuration page just keeps reopening.

title: MCP server crashes on startup
body: As soon as I add the mcp server entry to the config, the agent panics with ENOENT before any tool is invoked.

title: VS Code extension fails to load on Windows WSL
body: Devcontainer with remote ssh — the codex extension simply does not activate. No errors in the developer console.

title: Quota exceeded after one hour of normal usage
body: Hit the 5-hour limit way before five hours; the rate limit usage remaining counter seems wrong.

title: Pro plan pricing is too expensive for solo devs
body: At current per-token rates the pro plan is unaffordable for individual developers experimenting with the API.

title: Out of credits warning appears even with quota left
body: Billing details show plenty of remaining usage but the CLI reports purchase more credits and refuses to run.

title: Approval prompt omits diff/file details
body: The subagent patch approval prompt does not show which files are changing or the diff content; users have to blindly approve.

title: Diff view flickers when scrolling
body: The review pane flickers and the loading icon spins indefinitely on long diffs.

title: Auto-accept toggle is buried three menus deep
body: The accept diffs / auto accept toggle is too hard to find. UX is confusing.

title: Codex CLI panics with traceback on startup
body: Stack trace points to a typeerror in the bootstrap code; the process exits with status code 1 immediately.

title: segfault when running on macOS arm64
body: Reproducible segfault on every invocation; attaching the crash report.

title: diff edit failed: timeout waiting for child process to exit
body: The diff edit mismatch error fires after every long-running build step; eventually the cli crashes.

title: Memory leak after running codex for 30 minutes
body: High cpu and memory leak; the process becomes unresponsive and eventually frozen.

title: Painfully slow streaming on large repositories
body: Initial indexing takes forever — painfully slow even on a fast machine.

title: Resume picker slowed to a crawl
body: After the last update the resume picker slowed; sluggish UI for any session list longer than ~50 entries.

title: Please add support for custom OAuth providers
body: Feature request: allow disabling the built-in github auth and bring back support for arbitrary OAuth callbacks.

title: Can you add an option to skip the approval prompt
body: It would be great to have a flag for power users to bypass the approval prompt entirely on trusted repos.

title: [FEATURE] please add multi-window session support
body: What feature would you like to see — multi-window session support across detached terminals.

title: Setup documentation needs a walkthrough
body: The current setup documentation is unclear; would help to have a walkthrough or troubleshooting guide for first-time configuration.

title: OpenAI Codex hands-on review
body: Hands-on walkthrough of the new release — guide and how-to for getting started.

title: Outdated docs for the OpenAI-compatible /v1 endpoint
body: The base_url examples in the readme still reference v0 routes that 404 with http 404.

title: http 401 unauthorized when using openai-compatible provider
body: Sending a valid api key against the openai-compatible /v1 endpoint returns a 401 unauthorized; headers not defined.

title: Prompt injection in agent output runs arbitrary commands
body: A crafted markdown comment in the codebase causes the agent to exfiltrate api key values to a remote server. Sandbox escape.

title: Sandbox escape via tool invocation
body: Path traversal in the file editing tool lets the agent read whole filesystem outside the project root.

title: hello world thanks everyone
body: just saying hi to the community.

title: is this on the roadmap for q3?
body: curious about the timeline.

title: OpenAi CODEX (Online) Merge Pull request - branch has conflicts
Codex CLI stopped showing my progress logs at some point
Codex Updates: Mini Model, Higher Limits & Priority Processing
thread/resume and thread/fork ignore developerInstructions override on first resumed turn
Full access session still launches in workspace-write sandbox without NVIDIA device passthrough
ANSI Escape Code Injection in OpenAI's Codex CLI
Support additionalContext in PreToolUse hooks or clarify Claude-style hook parity
A Project with OpenAI Codex CLI
How to start a new Codex session
Is there a way to bypass the approval prompt on trusted repos?
Missing docs for shell completion setup
README unclear about quickstart steps
Codex CLI troubleshooting guide is outdated
thread/resume ignores additionalContext on first resumed turn
body: The additionalContext is provided but the model does not use it after resume.

title: additionalContext is not passed to PreToolUse hook payload
body: The hook receives the event but the additionalContext field is missing from the payload.

title: additionalContext crashes PreToolUse hook execution
body: When additionalContext is present, the hook crashes before the tool call completes.
